title: More Nonsense Limerick 44
content:
There was a young person of Janina,
    Whose uncle was always a fanning her;
    When he fanned off her head, 
    She smiled sweetly, and said,
    "You propitious old person of Janina!"
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "More Nonsense Limerick 44"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
